calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion To Vacate Dismissal And Enter Judgment Pursuant To Ccp Sec 664.6 And Of Nonappearance
Off Calendar Sep-20-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF STATE FARM MUTUAL AUTOMOBILE INSURANCE CO.'S Motion To Vacate Dismissal And Enter Judgment Pursuant To CCP Sec 664.6 And Of Nonappearance. Plaintiff's unopposed "motion to vacate dismissal and enter judgment" is granted. Order is signed. (see scanned order for details)

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/RBU)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE/status conference RE: MOTION TO VACATE DISMISSAL AND REINSTATE CASE (HEARD ON 1/21/16 BEFORE HON. GOLDSMITH)
Off Calendar May-30-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances (by Zoom):
Tristan Espinosa, Esq. 760-842-5850 X236 Reese Law Group for Plaintiff.
No other Appearance.

RULING - Hearing is held. The Court shares views on proof of service filed 5 court days prior to hearing. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE/status conference RE: MOTION TO VACATE DISMISSAL AND REINSTATE CASE. (HEARD ON 1/21/16 BEFORE HON. GOLDSMITH)

The Court orders Counsel to Re-notice motion, file and serve in compliance with CCP 1005.

Judge: Richard B, Ulmer Jr., Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/RBU)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE: MOTION TO VACATE DISMISSAL AND REINSTAE CASE (HEARD ON 1/21/16 BEFORE HON. GOLDSMITH)
Off Calendar Apr-26-2023 Continued To May-30-23 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: Appearances (by Zoom):
Tristan Espinosa, Esq. 760-842-5850 x236 Reese Law Group, tespinosa@reeselawgroup.com for Plaintiff State Farm
No other appearance.

RULING - A R G U E D. Hearing is held. Mr. Espinosa updates the Court on the status of the case and why the case should be reinstated. Former firm dropped the ball on the proposed order that was heard 7 years ago. Defendant has defaulted on payments and Plaintiff would like to enter a judgment. The Court shares his views on the damages for 11,000. Counsel responds. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE/status conference RE: MOTION TO VACATE DISMISSAL AND REINSTATE CASE

Continued to 5/30/23 for a status conference to give the opposing side a chance to appear and to get counsel. Counsel to give notice and file a declaration. In addition, Counsel to file a motion to substitute as counsel asap.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/RBU)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Vacate Dismissal And Reinstate Case
Off Calendar Jan-21-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

PLAINTIFF STATE FARM MUTUAL AUTOMOBILE INSURANCE CO.'S Motion To Vacate Dismissal And Reinstate Case is granted. No opposition filed. The prevailing party is to provide a form of order.

Judge: Ernest Goldsmith. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976. (302/EG)
